scope: local deterministic completion gate packet and worker handoff

summary.completionGate: The dynamic encounter factory path is packeted for handoff as a local metadata, review, and evidence-gated development posture. Deterministic definition, work-order, humanoid metadata, runtime-bundle, admin-gate, XR-use-gate, replay-evidence, and provider-gate surfaces exist for ED chest pain and peds asthma, but learner use and readiness claims remain blocked by review/evidence gates.
completeCapabilities: shared dynamic behavior and dry-run summary contracts
deterministic scenario-definition factory-planning projection for ED chest pain and peds asthma
metadata-only encounter definition to asset work-order bridge
humanoid realism metadata contract for face, eyes, mouth, pose, clothing, skin, rigging, animation, collision, interaction, provenance, and limitations
runtime bundle assembly audit boundary with publisher readiness separated from learner-use readiness
admin review gate orchestration for factory planning, work orders, runtime bundle gates, humanoid blockers, evidence gates, and review actions
WebXR generated-bundle learner-use gate that blocks pending evidence and falls back to fixture assets
replayable evidence handoff linking review packet, trace, patient note, actor turns, runtime evidence refs, generated-bundle blockers, and publication blockers
provider gate metadata for model/dialogue, STT, TTS, emotional prosody, lip-sync timing, and asset-generation provider paths
blockingThemes: human/expert review gates remain required before learner use
runtime-realism, humanoid visual-QA, and Quest/WebXR evidence gates remain pending or review-blocked
peds asthma remains draft/stage_0_synthetic_draft and must not be treated as approved
generated assets and local payload artifacts are not production assets and do not establish Quest, clinical, or scoring readiness
live provider readiness requires explicit credentials, policy approval, and evidence before use

humanoidMetadata.actorCoverage: patient, nurse, spouse/family roles covered by metadata/work-order contract

xrUseGate.safeBehavior: Generated/API/static learner bundles are rejected when runtime-realism, visual-QA, or Quest evidence gates are pending; UI-XR falls back to local fixture assets and displays generated-bundle blockers.

nextApprovedWorker.workerId: Worker 9 plus Worker 11 evidence-gated realism review
nextApprovedWorker.safeSlice: Capture or attach focused runtime-realism and humanoid visual-QA evidence only when verifying the current generated-bundle posture; do not refresh broad benchmarks or claim readiness.
allowedWrites: docs/openclinxr runtime-realism or visual-QA evidence JSON/report files
stopIf: evidence would imply Quest readiness, production readiness, clinical validity, or scoring validity
new cloud/paid provider use is needed

humanoidMetadata.actorCoverage: child patient, parent/family, and nurse/respiratory support roles covered by metadata/work-order contract

xrUseGate.safeBehavior: Generated/API/static learner bundles are rejected when review, runtime-realism, visual-QA, or Quest evidence gates are pending; UI-XR must not treat peds asthma as approved learner content.

nextApprovedWorker.workerId: Worker 4 plus Worker 7/8 review-gate closure prep
nextApprovedWorker.safeSlice: Prepare review packets/checklists for pediatrician, psychometrician, legal, and simulation-QA review without marking peds asthma approved or learner-use ready.
allowedWrites: docs/openclinxr review-gate markdown or JSON handoff files
stopIf: reviewer approval must be asserted without evidence
clinical validity or scoring validity would be implied
new cloud/paid provider use is needed

globalNextApprovedWorkers.safeSlice: Focused runtime-realism and humanoid visual-QA evidence attachment for the generated-bundle gates, using only evidence that verifies touched/local runtime behavior.
Peds asthma review packet/checklist preparation while preserving draft and non-readiness posture.
Provider-gate evidence collection or policy documentation for local/manual providers only, with live/cloud readiness remaining false.

operatorHandoff.packetMeaning: Use this packet as the machine-readable completion gate and next-worker routing artifact for the dynamic encounter factory completion plan.
doNotDoNext: do not materialize generated assets just to satisfy this packet
do not run broad benchmark refreshes without a named dependent decision
do not enable generated bundle learner use while evidence gates are pending
do not claim Quest readiness, production readiness, clinical validity, or scoring validity
